title: BCreate
description: Casual tech-pack with a Create Mod core.
body:
# BCreate

This pack, originally designed for a small SMP is designed to be a casual and performent experience for people prefferably familiar with the create mod, imagine Hermitcraft but with [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) & Tech Mods.

### When it comes to the heart of the modpack we have:
- Optimizations mods: Sodium, [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)(Underrated), C2ME, Indium, Nvidium, StutterFix, ModernFix and many more.
  
- [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) + some addons ([Steam 'n Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [Ench Insustry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric), [Stone Gens](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cobblestone), [New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)),

- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) For more end-game content and some practical use for Create New Age,

- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) for cool weapons,

- [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) with 40 additional origins
  - Includes Datapacks form `@notpog` and `@phantompig`  

- and naturally [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).

### Some more default info:
- No Phantoms, bats drop membranes instead, it is also encouraged to destroy any phantom monuments with a nuke
- Elytras are disabled
- Netherite armor is disabled, to keep the casuality (though still *possible* to obtain)

Hopefully these mods will satiate most types of intrinsicly motivated people, remember that Create mod has too many possibilities to constantly work on the best farms, just make the train across the entire map in the overworld, just for fun.

## Technical info:
- The pack requires atleast:
  - ~8GB of RAM for clients
  - ~4GB of RAM for servers
  - ~12GB for SinglePlayer (using both the clint and server)
- 2 server cores work for me
- Not much else matters if your hardware isn't from before 2005

### Server version
Since BCreate v2 the pack has been split into two: a Client/Shared version and Server version because of awful Singleplayer performance on 8GB of RAM, I didn't want to make a second page just for the server files so since v3 they're in a zip file in the "Additional Files". From now on i will reffer to the client side as just "the pack" and Additional server files as "Server files".

- The pack itself has all the configs for the server version(except for DC2MC), there are only mods in the server files
### Server side mods exclusives

- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) for beautiful world gen without new blocks <3

- Almost all of [YUNG's Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api)

##### In case of any issues you can contact me on discord (`@n1ktwazny`)
